subject: refactor(ProjectImage): remove hardcoded fallback color
body:
ProjectImage had '#737373' hardcoded twice as a fallback for the accent
prop. Projects.tsx already resolves DEFAULT_ACCENT before passing it
down, so the fallback was redundant. Made accent required on
ProjectImage to enforce single source of truth (DEFAULT_ACCENT in
Projects.tsx).

Tags: styling, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-redesign
Semver: patch
